summary: K9Command Normalization and Business Rules Testing - Iteration 19. All 15 backend tests passed. Verified: Role governance (customer-only public signup, staff returns 202, admin returns 403), Hours-based refund policy (48h=100%, 24-48h=50%, <24h=0%), Booking/Dog field normalization.
critical_code_review_comments: Hours-based refund calculation correctly uses total_seconds()/3600 in both frontend (client.js) and backend (pricing_engine.py)
Role governance properly enforced: customer=200, staff=202 (request), admin=403 (unless first admin)
AuthForm.js correctly has NO role selection dropdown - customer-only public signup
StaffRequestPage.js exists at /staff-request with proper form for staff access requests
CustomerDashboard.js has cancellation modal with refund preview showing hours, percentage, and amount
seed_data_creation: Created test users during role governance tests (auto-cleanup not implemented)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All normalization and business rules verified working. Role governance: public signup is customer-only (no role dropdown in UI), staff requests return 202 and create pending request, admin registration returns 403 if admin exists. Hours-based refund policy: >=48h=100%, 24-48h=50%, <24h=0%. Frontend is in 'mock' mode by default (REACT_APP_DATA_MODE).

role_governance.customer_registration: PASS - Returns 200 with token and user
role_governance.staff_registration: PASS - Returns 202 (request submitted, not account created)
role_governance.auth_form_no_role_dropdown: PASS - UI verified, no role selection in public signup
role_governance.staff_request_page: PASS - /staff-request page exists with proper form

cancellation_refund_policy.48h_full_refund: PASS - Code verified in pricing_engine.py and client.js
cancellation_refund_policy.cancellation_modal: PASS - CustomerDashboard has refund preview modal

booking_normalization.booking_list: PASS - Returns bookings with date fields

dog_normalization.dog_list: PASS - Returns dogs with expected fields

mocked_apis.email_smtp: MOCKED - Emails stored in email_outbox collection
mocked_apis.frontend_data_mode: MOCK - Frontend uses localStorage-backed mock data by default
